prompts.name: Review the install plan
prompts.description: Summarize the Craft footprint and confirm bounded use.
prompts.body: Review the requested research task, required capabilities, optional enhancements, provenance, and declared resource bounds. State what will happen and stop for confirmation before execution.

workflows.name: Bounded research cycle
workflows.description: Plan, execute, evaluate, and summarize one reviewable research cycle.
steps: Declare scope, authority, provenance, and resource limits.
Select the smallest reproducible action and record its inputs.
Run only within the declared bounds and preserve resumable state.
Evaluate outputs against a predeclared criterion.
Summarize evidence, limitations, and the next human checkpoint.

modifications: Pinned to Orchestra Research commit 773a52944ba4747a18bd4ae9ade53fff041adcbc and normalized for Coven Codex packaging.
Rewrote continuous autonomy defaults to require explicit time, compute, storage, network, and spend bounds.
Removed implicit commit/push, recurring scheduling, external messaging, and autonomous scope/pivot/publication behavior; state remains resumable only in an approved project directory.

modifications: Adapted and audited for Coven Craft packaging, local provenance, and bounded execution.
Normalized frontmatter to Codex-supported name, description, and license fields while retaining the instructional body.
Replaced the unavailable scientific-skills literature-review reference with a capability-neutral handoff.
Added a Coven boundary that keeps ideation advisory until execution is separately authorized.
Normalized frontmatter to Codex-supported name, description, and license fields while retaining the instructional body.
Replaced the unavailable scientific-skills literature-review reference with a capability-neutral handoff.
Added a Coven boundary that labels speculation and requires separate authorization before execution.

prompts.name: Open a research space
prompts.description: Generate, challenge, and rank bounded research directions.
prompts.body: Open the research space around {{topic}}. Use both Seeker's Lens ideation skills to generate distinct directions, label assumptions and unknowns, then rank the strongest three by novelty, impact, evidence gap, and feasibility. Stop with a proposed checkpoint; do not begin experiments.

prompts.name: Stress-test a research idea
prompts.description: Probe a candidate direction before committing resources.
prompts.body: Stress-test {{research idea}}. Reformulate it at three abstraction levels, identify the strongest contradiction or boundary case, compare a simpler baseline, and state the evidence that would change the recommendation. End with a bounded pilot and a human go/no-go checkpoint.

workflows.name: Diverge, converge, refine
workflows.description: Move from a broad topic to a reviewable pilot without starting execution.
steps: Define the research space, stakeholders, constraints, and explicit resource bounds.
Generate diverse candidate directions with multiple ideation lenses.
Challenge candidates with contradiction, boundary, simplicity, and feasibility checks.
Rank the strongest directions and expose assumptions, evidence gaps, and likely objections.
Draft one bounded pilot and stop at a human go/no-go checkpoint.
